name: bonobo_chrY_RBMY_amplicon
description: Pan paniscus chrY RBMY amplicon (AZFb). AmpliconY copy structure differs strongly between great apes; bonobo estimated copies: 8. Substrate for intrachromosomal NAHR and rapid Y-lineage turnover (Hughes/Page 2010, T2T-ape 2024).

architecture.internal_structure: Y ampliconic family RBMY; intra-Y NAHR via arm-to-arm gene-conversion; copy number under strong meiotic-drive-like turnover.

related_diseases: ape Y spermatogenic phenotypes (analogous to human AZFa/b/c)
